LanguageData.ABY_CrownshardStormcaster.label: crownshard stormcaster
LanguageData.ABY_CrownshardStormcaster.description: A dominion-grade crown weapon built around a sealed storm chamber and a lattice of sanctioned crown-shards. Each discharge launches a compact storm seed that ruptures into a controlled field of cutting fragments, denying ground rather than deleting a single target. It is at its best against clustered hostiles, mechanoid frames and fortified systems, while dedicated duel weapons still outperform it against isolated bosses.
LanguageData.ABY_CrownshardStormSeed.label: crownshard storm seed
LanguageData.ABY_CrownshardStormNode.label: crownshard storm node
